sectionInfo.title: Professional Experience
sectionInfo.description: My journey as a developer, showcasing the projects and roles that have shaped my career.

jobs.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant - Numerical Methods
jobs.description: Assisting students in understanding numerical computation techniques and programming applications in engineering contexts.
achievements: Graded, tutored, and guided 30+ students in numerical analysis and code implementation
Helped improve student scores by 25% through personalized tutoring and support
Liaised between faculty and students, ensuring smooth communication and timely feedback

jobs.title: Pega Developer Intern
jobs.description: Developed a Pega-based platform to streamline service bookings and automate customer workflows.
achievements: Built scalable service booking system with rule-based process automation
Reduced booking processing time by 30% through workflow optimization
Enhanced system efficiency by 40% using declarative rules and UI improvements

jobs.title: Cloud Engineering Intern
jobs.description: Worked on deploying and managing cloud infrastructure using core AWS services in a virtual internship program.
achievements: Configured and deployed infrastructure using EC2, S3, and CloudFormation
Gained hands-on experience with containerized services and Kubernetes orchestration
Collaborated with virtual teams to complete cloud project milestones in a 10-week internship
